rulings.Case Title: EDWIN NEIL ACOSTA ET AL VS. SHERMAN LEUNG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Dismissal Of Plaintiffs Action For Failure To Join Necessary And Indispensable Party After Court Order
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday February 1, 2016, line 2. DEFENDANT CASSELLI-LEUNG BENSHING, LLC, SHERMAN LEUNG Notice Of Motion And Motion For Dismissal Of Plaintiffs Action For Failure To Join Necessary And Indispensable Party After Court Order continued to February 11, 2016 in light of the ruling on Plaintiff's Motion to be Excused from June 10, 2015 Order. The ruling on the Motion to be Excused is as follows: "Plaintiff's Motion is Denied. Plaintiff shall comply with June 10, 2015 Order by no later than February 9, 2016 and file an complaint joining Victor Pedroza and serving Victor Pedroza. Plaintiff shall file declaration re: compliance no later than February 10, 2016, by noon." Prevailing party to prepare order on the Motion to be Excused. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MAXIMUS-BP 1979 MISSION STREET LLC, A DELAWARE LIM VS. ELAINE C. JANG
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens Or In The Alternative Require Undertaking And For The Attorneys Fees
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday February 1, 2016, line 3. DEFENDANT CRAIG JANG, CRYSTAL JANG, COREY JANG, CALVERT JANG, ELAINE JANG Notice Of Motion And Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens Or In The Alternative Require Undertaking And For The Attorneys Fees GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion to expunge is denied. Motion to require a bond is granted. Plaintiff shall post a bond in the amount of $36,880,000 with the Court no later than February 11, 2016. Plaintiff shall file a declaration showing compliance no later than February 16, 2016. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MAXIMUS-BP 1979 MISSION STREET LLC, A DELAWARE LIM VS. ELAINE C. JANG
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Special Motion And Special Motion To Strike (Ccp Section 425.16) As Against Fourth Cause Of Action In Cross-Complaint Of Jang Cross-Complainants
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday February 1, 2016, line 3. CROSS DEFENDANT MAXIMUS-BP 1979 MISSION STREET LLC, A DELAWARE LIM Notice Of Special Motion And Special Motion To Strike (Ccp Section 425.16) As Against Fourth Cause Of Action In Cross-Complaint Of Jang Cross-Complainants DENIED. Moving party has met the first prong and the opposing party has shown probability of prevailing on the merits regarding recordation of the Deed of Trust per PSA 1.4. See Mann.v Quality Old Time Service (2004) 120 Cal.App.4th 90. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID A. BRADLOW VS. NATALIE MARDEUSZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Natalie Mardeusz'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons; Mpa; Declaration
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday February 1, 2016, line 4. DEFENDANT NATALIE MARDEUSZ Defendant Natalie Mardeusz'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons; Mpa; Declaration DENIED. See Borsuk v Appellate Division (2015) 242 Cal.App.4th 607. Additionally, Defendant's declaration is insufficient to challenge proper service, as personal service is not the only proper means of service. POS by a registered process server re: posting and mailing on file. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID A. BRADLOW VS. NATALIE MARDEUSZ ET AL

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday February 1, 2016, line 4. DEFENDANT FRANK MARDEUSZ Doe Defendant Frank Mardeusz'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons; Filed At The Insistence Of Litigant DENIED. See Borsuk v Appellate Division (2015) 242 Cal.App.4th 607. Additionally, Defendant's declaration is insufficient to challenge proper service, as personal service is not the only proper means of service. POS by a registered process server re: posting and mailing on file. = (501/REQ)
